description.text: Syntegon MLF 5000 – Pharmaceutical Dispensing and Weighing Module (Dispensing Unit + Weighing System only). Resource AAS within a filling line context.

value.text: Syntegon Technology GmbH
MLF 5000 – Dispensing & Weighing Module (Vials and Cartridges)
MLF Series Dispensing Modules
DE
Robert-Bosch-Str. 8
Waiblingen

value.value: EU GMP Annex 1 / FDA 21 CFR Part 211

value.text: Liquid Dispensing into Vials and Cartridges
Gravimetric In-Process Control (IPC)
Dispense Target Volume into Container

value.value: State=IDLE AND ContainerPresent AND PumpPrimed AND RecipeLoaded
State=IDLE AND ContainerPresent=true AND PumpPrimed=true AND RecipeLoaded=true AND NoAlarm

description.text: Dispense a target fill weight of product into a container using the peristaltic pump
Target net fill weight for this dispense operation [g]
Accepted ± deviation from target fill weight [g]
Peristaltic pump speed setpoint [rpm]
Nominal fill time per container [ms]
Container format identifier (e.g. Vial_2mL, Vial_5mL, Cartridge_1mL)
Recipe identifier to load for this dispense operation
Measured net weight of the filled container [g]
Outcome of the dispense operation: PASS, WARN or FAIL
Sequential container number within the active batch

value.text: Gravimetric Check-Weighing of Filled Container

value.value: ContainerOnBalance AND BalanceStable AND NOT TarePending

description.text: Perform a gravimetric check-weigh of a filled container against the expected net weight
Expected net weight to verify against [g]
Acceptance tolerance ± for the net weight check [g]
Balance settling time before the weight reading is taken [ms]
If true, automatically reject the container when outside tolerance
Measured gross weight (container + product) [g]
Stored tare weight for this container [g]
Calculated net weight (gross − tare) [g]
Outcome of the weigh check: PASS, WARN or FAIL

value.text: Prime Dispensing Pump and Purge Air

description.text: Purge air from the dispensing path and prime the peristaltic pump with product
Volume to dispense during each prime stroke [mL]
Pump speed during priming — slow to avoid air entrainment [rpm]
Number of prime strokes before confirming an air-free product path
True when the product path is confirmed air-free after priming
Outcome of the prime sequence: PASS or FAIL

value.text: Tare Empty Container on Analytical Balance

description.text: Record the empty container weight on the analytical balance (tare cycle)
Maximum time allowed for the balance to settle before tare is applied [ms]
If true, re-reads the balance after tare to confirm zero within resolution
Stored tare weight for the container [g]
Outcome of the tare cycle: PASS or FAIL

value.text: Physical position of this module in the filling line
Identifier of the parent filling line
Static calibration offset applied to all balance readings
Date of last traceable balance calibration (ISO 8601)
Reference to the calibration certificate
Pump speed–to–volume scaling factor (from volume calibration)
Date of last pump volume calibration
Hardware maximum fill volume (pump + nozzle system limit)
Hardware minimum fill volume (pump + nozzle system limit)
Module-level maximum allowed product temperature (regulatory limit)
Hardware throughput ceiling for this module
Regulatory clean room classification this module must operate within

description.text: JSON Schema for PackML state messages from the dispensing module.

definition.text: PackML state machine status payload including State enum (17 states) and optional Uuid. Extends data.schema.json (TimeStamp). Ref: AAU Smart Production Lab AP2030-UNS.
